personal.name: Rahul Kumar
personal.title: Computer Science Undergraduate | Frontend and Security Enthusiast
personal.tagline: I build responsive, user-focused web experiences and apply security-first thinking to solve real engineering challenges.

summary.heading: About Me
paragraphs: Building responsive and user-centric web products, I specialize in turning ideas into clean, scalable frontend implementations with React and modern JavaScript.
Developing practical, high-clarity interfaces, I focus on strong component architecture, smooth interactions, and consistent performance across devices.
Designing with a security mindset, I integrate safer coding practices and validation-first thinking to deliver reliable digital experiences.
highlights: Building modern frontend applications with **React.js**, **Next.js**, and ES6+ JavaScript
Optimizing UI quality through structured problem-solving and clean implementation patterns
Delivering practical projects that combine usability, responsiveness, and engineering discipline
Applying a **security-first mindset** with hands-on exposure to packet analysis and network tools

projects.name: Password Checking System
projects.description: Engineered an authentication-focused password validation tool that detects weak credentials and guides users toward stronger password practices.
highlights: Implemented robust password strength logic using regular expressions and rule-based checks
Automated validation across length, complexity, and character diversity criteria
Delivered real-time, actionable feedback to improve authentication hygiene

projects.name: Responsive Website - Cinematic Movie Discovery Platform
projects.description: Built a modern movie discovery interface that enables seamless browsing across devices with intuitive navigation and engaging visual hierarchy.
highlights: Designed a clean, mobile-first frontend experience for quick content exploration
Structured responsive layouts for consistent usability on desktop and mobile
Optimized page organization and interaction flow for better movie discovery

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science and Engineering

training.title: C++ Programming: OOPS and DSA
training.summary: Completed 35+ hours of structured, hands-on training focused on object-oriented design and data structure implementation in C++.
highlights: Practiced arrays, stacks, queues, and linked lists through coding assignments
Applied STL-based problem-solving with attention to time and space complexity
Strengthened algorithmic reasoning through guided assessments and practice

certifications.title: Master Generative AI and Generative AI Tools (ChatGPT and More)
Legacy JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures

achievements: Earned 5-Star rank in C++ on HackerRank (Jan 2026), reflecting strong problem-solving consistency.
Secured a Top 5 position in the university hackathon Code of Duty (Mar 2024).
Built and presented a functional prototype within a 24-hour competitive hackathon window.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.message: I am actively exploring internship and entry-level software roles where I can contribute to frontend engineering and secure application development.
